agentAbility.name: Creeping Barrage
agentAbility.description: Calls in a moving artillery strike with HE shells to clear positions and support allied pushes.

agentTrait.name: Stubborn
agentTrait.description: Provides damage mitigation and grants stackable extra protection while holding or contesting objectives.

primaryAttack.name: Single Shot
primaryAttack.description: Requires reload after each shot, most accurate when stationary.

tankAbilities.name: Active Protection System
tankAbilities.description: Intercepts shells passing through a collider attached to the vehicle.

tankAbilities.name: Vulcan Auto Turret
tankAbilities.description: Activates an automatic turret that prioritizes threatening and vulnerable targets.
